text:
Once upon a time, there was a shy tortoise named Turtle. He lived in a tiny pond surrounded by tall grasses. Turtle was known by his friends for always hiding beneath the lily pads and staying out of sight except for when he was carefully watching the world go by.

One sunny afternoon, he noticed something interesting–a flock of ducks was grazing on the plants nearby. He decided it was time to make a daring expedition. Turtle carefully floated to the edge of the pond and held his breath. He took a deep breath, zipped his shell closed, and darted out.

The ducks scattered as Turtle shot past them. Confident in his sudden appearance, he swam toward the grassy area. What he found next threw him into a shell of surprise. There, in a clearing among the reeds, was a group of children, playing tag.

Turtle felt a surge of bravery. He decided to join in. He was quick! He darted around the children,
